author: claude
content: PUMP-CLAIMED: user notes the FF caching behavior is not guaranteed + a prior Moz-central investigation was inconclusive. Dispatching an INVESTIGATION agent to post a detailed report on GH #1162 so we can DECIDE whether retry is the correct approach. Key angles: (1) can FF cache prefs make cause-1 (tab image/memory cache sharing) deterministic; (2) can the test be RESTRUCTURED to tolerate cache-nondeterminism (assert only deterministic parts, like #1163's DNS approach); (3) the cause-3 visitID data-corruption race is a SEPARATE real bug to fix regardless of the retry decision.
